pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-K-005 (Data Governance) scores 0.411 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for Cloud Data Architect: edge_case. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA excluded at Pass 2 (scope: edge_case) or Pass 3. No market evidence warrants reversal for Cloud Data Architect.
